attraction_name: Hangzhou Hubin Intime in77 Area A
description: A well-known shopping center in Hangzhou, located by West Lake, featuring a wide range of brands and convenient transportation.
The most famous of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a causeway built under the supervision of Su Dongpo, renowned for its willow trees in spring.
A large musical fountain located in Lakeside Third Park, offering spectacular nighttime performances synchronized with music.
China's first national wetland park, boasting beautiful ecological environments and a filming location for 'If You Are the One.'
A historical and cultural pedestrian street in Hangzhou, preserving the street layout from the Southern Song Dynasty, ideal for strolling.

attraction_name: China Knife, Scissors, and Sword Museum
description: A specialized museum showcasing the craftsmanship of Chinese knives, scissors, and swords, providing insight into Hangzhou's traditional handicrafts.
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, located on Xiaoyingzhou Island, named for the reflection of three stone pagodas resembling moons.
Hangzhou's most representative historical and cultural district, retaining Ming and Qing architectural styles, with numerous specialty shops.

attraction_name: China Academy of Art Xiangshan Campus
description: A renowned art academy with unique architectural design, perfect for art enthusiasts to visit.
A well-preserved historical district featuring typical Jiangnan water town architecture and a strong sense of local life.
The largest island in West Lake, home to concentrated historical and cultural attractions, offering a serene environment.
A reconstructed ancient pagoda with a history of over a thousand years, providing panoramic views of West Lake and closely tied to the legend of 'The Legend of the White Snake.'
A scenic avenue on the west side of West Lake, quieter compared to Su Causeway, ideal for leisurely walks.
A viewing platform by the Qiantang River, offering views of the river and Hangzhou's city skyline.
A famous ancient Buddhist temple in China with a history of approximately 1,700 years, known for its thriving incense offerings and magnificent architecture.

attraction_name: Southern Song Imperial Street Zhongshan Road Pedestrian Street
description: A modern pedestrian street built on the site of the Southern Song Imperial City, blending historical culture with modern commerce.
